summary: No extra deterministic setup is needed. The resolved jackson-mapper-asl 1.9.0 POM declares only jackson-core-asl 1.9.0 as a normal transitive dependency, and the library is an in-process JSON data-binding library used through ObjectMapper, not a service-backed client.
risks: jackson-mapper-asl contains optional handlers for XML/DOM and Joda-Time types, but these are optional integration paths and do not justify adding extra dependencies for this native-image runtime failure.
The reported failures are native-image reflection metadata issues in existing in-memory Jackson tests, not missing external setup.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #6264 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.codehaus.jackson:jackson-mapper-asl:1.9.0; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015
